form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up won by 1.3 len this track on February 23 over 3500m on heavy track defeating Folie Golith carrying 67kg at $9.30 in a steeplechase. Second-up fell at this track on March 14 over 3500m. Fitter now and making headway every start. Rates highly.

form.formComment: Resuming today after six months. Finished off last preparation 3 of 8 starters at this track in the LR October 12 over 3500m, slow track; 12 len behind Nador with 66kg at $34. Previously first up; 5 of 12 runners at this track September 23 over 3500m, slow track; 28 len behind Duc De Roche with 66kg at $12. Can return in winning form.

form.formComment: Third-up today. To post a big 9 len win. Saint Brieuc on February 15 over 3600m in the wet defeating Jerusalema with 64kg in a steeplechase. Last start made some head-way from midfield; finished third of 10 runners at Meslay-du-Maine on March 15 over 3500m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Dschingis Empress carrying 68kg. No surprise to see him in the mix.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up came from midfield; finished fourth of 12 runners at Compiegne on March 2 over 3600m, 23 len behind Metronomique with 67kg at $70. Second run from a spell finished sixth of 13 runners at this track on March 22 over 3600m, slow track; 11 len behind Milord Roque with 66kg at $22. Unlikely to feature given current form.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation 6 of 9 starters at this track in the G2 October 12 over 3600m, slow track; 28 len behind Leopard Du Berlais with 66kg at $40. At debut 6 of 7 runners at this track in the LR September 9 over 3600m, slow track; 13 len behind Lotus Vert carrying 65kg at $7.70. Well-placed to return a winner.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished second of 12 starters at Argentan on March 6 over 3600m, slow track; 1.0 len behind Normandy Man with 68kg at $2.80. Second-up held ground to the line finished second of 12 runners at Moulins on March 21 over 3800m, slow track; 4 len behind Lady Dahlia with 67kg. Have to include.

form.formComment: Last run fell at Nantes on March 31 over 3800m. The run before pulled up at this track on March 1 over 3500m. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Last run fell at Nantes on March 31 over 3800m. The run before pulled up at this track on March 1 over 3500m. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 42 days. First-up after five months settled back and ran on when finished seventh of 12 starters at Compiegne on March 2 over 3600m, 37 len behind Metronomique with 68kg at $20. Previously second-up finished sixth of 12 starters at this track on October 7 over 3500m, 22 len behind Mountain Ridge carrying 67kg at $4.40. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up couldn't go on with it; finished fifth of 10 starters at this track on March 7 over 3500m, on slow going 23 len behind Millares carrying 66kg at $9.30. Last start finished fourth of 16 runners at Compiegne on March 23 over 3400m, slow track; 21 len behind Moises Has A Boat with 68kg at $11. Certainly worth including.
